title: Endermen Infection
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b196770dc13d4d56894cd92a7b399f9e45ccda0_0.webp)
Mod Description


Tired of peaceful mobs wandering through the world without fear? Enderman Infection brings a new kind of horror to Minecraft. With this mod, Endermen no longer keep to themselves — now they aggressively hunt all mobs, spreading a terrifying plague across the land.



Features

- Makes Endermen attack all mobs

- When a mob dies to an Endermen they turn into another Endermen
